results.title: 7 AEDP Courses in India That Are Highly Industry Relevant
results.description: As India’s industries rapidly embrace digital transformation, automation, advanced manufacturing and specialised services, the demand for job-ready graduates continues to grow. results.title: Utho Cloud Announces 10,000 GPUs Expansion to Build India’s Sovereign AI Compute Backbone
results.description: Utho Cloud has announced its landmark commitment to deploy 10,000 GPUs in the next 7-8 quarters as part of its long-term vision to build India’s sovereign AI compute backbone.
